identificationModule.briefTitle: FLOW: Evaluate Renal and Cardiovascular Outcomes with Semaglutide FLO in Participants With Type 2 Diabetes and Chronic Kidney Disease
identificationModule.officialTitle: FLOW: A Multicenter, Randomized, Double-Blind, Placebo-Controlled Trial

descriptionModule.briefSummary: This trial evaluates semaglutide (GLP-1 receptor agonist) in patients with type 2 diabetes and CKD. Included as context for comparator class (GLP-1 agonists vs SGLT2 inhibitors).

interventions.name: Semaglutide
interventions.description: GLP-1 receptor agonist, 1.0 mg weekly subcutaneous
